projectDescription: AI-powered email management platform that automatically labels Gmail and Outlook messages in real time and drafts intelligent replies in your tone.
keyFeatures: Automatic real-time email labeling for Gmail and Outlook
AI-generated reply drafts in the user's tone
9 built-in email categories plus custom labels
Unsubscribe manager to reduce inbox clutter
Analytics dashboard with email trends, label distribution, and activity heatmap
Draft sensitivity controls and custom prompts
7-day free trial with subscription via DodoPay
publicApiSurface: Email label categories: Action Needed, Pending Response, Automated Alerts, Finance, Event Update, Discussion, Read Only, Resolved, Marketing
Draft preference settings: prompt, signature, sensitivity, font size, font color
